steps.t: Traps can be found outside the hamlet of Alagrant, in the Blackroot Vale. Dírion has asked you to search the traps outside Alagrant for any sign of 'B…
The sprung trap can be found outside Alagrant, in the Blackroot Vale. You have found a small blue object caught in one the traps. You should free 'Blu…
Draug can be found in Alagrant, in the Blackroot Vale. You have found 'Blue' in one of the traps outside Alagrant. You should return 'Blue' to Draug i…
Dírion can be found in Alagrant, in the Blackroot Vale. You have returned 'Blue' to Draug and he appears pleased. You should talk to Dírion.
